expectations.text: Produces plans across multiple phases that can execute in parallel
expectations.evidence: 6 plans across 3 phases: Phase 01 (2 plans), Phase 02 (2 plans), Phase 03 (2 plans). Phase 01 and Phase 02 are independent and can execute simultaneously.

expectations.text: Phase 1 and Phase 2 plans have zero file overlap
expectations.evidence: Phase 1 writes to src/ (Next.js app). Phase 2 writes to services/ingestion/ (standalone service). Completely separate file trees.

expectations.text: Correctly excludes SSO from Sprint 1 scope
expectations.evidence: No SSO/SAML plan exists. SSO deferred to Phase 8 (Sprint 4) per roadmap.

expectations.text: Higher max parallelism than old skill
expectations.evidence: Max 4 agents at once (Phase 1 Wave 1 + Phase 2 Wave 1, then Phase 1 Wave 2 + Phase 2 Wave 2) vs old skill max 2 agents.

expectations.text: Plans have complete task anatomy (files, action, verify, done)
expectations.evidence: All 6 plans have properly structured tasks with all four required fields.
